subject: LU-814 test: automate NFS over lustre testing

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 2: Verified

Build Successful 
 
http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/3186/ : SUCCESS

Patch Set 2: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

I'd suggest to move the common functions for parallel-scale{,-nfsv3,-nfsv4}.sh into a common file so that we do not need to maintain three copies of those functions in case there are any changes for them.

Patch Set 2:

It's better to add the variables which could be specified by users for NFS over Lustre testing into the cfg/ncli.sh file and add some comments for them.

It's better to add the variables which could be specified by users for NFS over Lustre testing into the cfg/ncli.sh file and add some comments for them.

Patch Set 17:

YuJian, I will try to put into a common file, definitely not callling parallel-scale.sh since the test name if different which caused issue last time I tried.

As for variable in ncli.sh, I don't think it's needed because NFSCLIENT is now private variable. There is no user setting needed

parents.subject: LU-506 tests: check lustre.conf for modprobe

commit.subject: LU-814 test: automate NFS over lustre testing
commit.message:
LU-814 test: automate NFS over lustre testing

Provide setup nfs within auster framework

Signed-off-by: Minh Diep <mdiep@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Icfd61bf6772807a344576b92b5268a83a7b79e4b
